_comment: Canonical Triage model. Classifies incoming user messages into complexity and intent buckets to route to the appropriate AI (Assistant vs Primary).
name: Triage
description: Routes user messages based on complexity and intent.

agent_mode.description: The current AI mode (operator_bound, operator_not_bound, etc.)

intent_summary.description: A concise summary of the user's goal.

follow_up_question.description: Clarifying question if intent is ambiguous.

clarifying_questions.description: Batch of 3 yes/no clarifying questions from the Interrogator when intent confidence is low.

request_posture.description: Triage's read of the user's state. Downstream agents calibrate dissent and denial-memory on this value. 'adversarial' requires a link to prior denied content in the conversation history; a first-turn message cannot be adversarial.
